story.text:
# ✨ Travel Oasis
**🌳 → 🪐(oasis) → 🌳(elsewhere)**
*vagari · holon · V31*

Travel between holons via the Oasis Protocol (from First Person Spellbook Act 24). The holon travels without losing itself.

> The Oasis Protocol is how a holon travels without losing itself. The road is the witness; the destination is the same holon.

*Keywords:* travel · oasis · protocol · fpa-24 · v31
